title: StatTiers
description: Official Fork Of Tiers Mod For Stat Tier List. Supports Other Tierlists: MCTiers, PvPTiers, Subtiers
body:
Offical Tier Tagger Mod For [Stattiers](https://discord.gg/XshQvjSBGR), also Supports Mctiers, PvPtiers, and Subtiers.

# **Features**

* Show Icon + Tiers next to and infront of nametags
* Selected Gamemode system (Choose what gamemode to display)
* Fully Client Side and working on all servers
* Multiple Tierlists With all Displayable
* A Tiers Screen/Prview Of all Tiers



# **Supported Gamemodes**

* Crystal
* Sword
* Diamond Pot
* Netherite Pot
* SMP
* Mace
* UHC
* Axe
* Speed
* DiaCrystal
* OGV
* DiaSMP
* Minecart


# **Commands**
* /Tiers (user)
* /Tiers -Config
* /Tiers -Toggle


# **Compatibility Currently**
* **Loader:** Fabric
* **Game Verison:** 1.21.11
* **Environment:** Client-side only

Server installation is not required.
